entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Grain protein crop (Cajanus cajan L. Millsp.) that thrives in P-deficient soils of tropical and subtropical Asia

entities.name: LOW PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: Condition of phosphorus deficiency in soil affecting plant growth and carbon distribution

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Tropical and subtropical region where pigeonpea is grown

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS UPTAKE
entities.description: The process and amount of phosphorus absorbed by the plant from the soil

entities.name: CARBON DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The partitioning of photosynthetic carbon between source and sink organs

entities.name: ICPH 8
entities.description: A high-yielding improved hybrid cultivar of pigeonpea tolerant to low phosphorus

entities.name: ICPL 87
entities.description: A low-yielding non-hybrid cultivar of pigeonpea

entities.name: UPAS 120
entities.description: A low-yielding non-hybrid cultivar of pigeonpea sensitive to low phosphorus

entities.name: 13CO2 LABELING
entities.description: The technique of feeding plants 13CO2 to track the distribution of photosynthetic carbon

entities.name: PLANT BIOMASS
entities.description: The total organic mass of the plant

entities.name: LEAF AREA
entities.description: The total surface area of the plant's leaves

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The process of photosynthetic activity and carbon fixation

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS ABSORPTION CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of a plant to absorb phosphorus from the soil

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS UTILIZATION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant uses absorbed phosphorus

entities.name: LEAF INITIATION
entities.description: The process of new leaf formation

entities.name: SHOOT GROWTH
entities.description: The growth and development of the above-ground plant parts

entities.name: SINK ACTIVITY
entities.description: The capacity of sink organs to receive and utilize photosynthetic carbon

entities.name: CELLULOSE BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The biological process of producing cellulose

entities.name: MERISTEMATIC SINK CELLS
entities.description: Cells in the meristem that act as carbon sinks

entities.name: RACEME
entities.description: The flowering part of the pigeonpea plant acting as a carbon sink

entities.name: ROOTS
entities.description: The underground part of the plant acting as a carbon sink

relationships.description: increased in favor of under low P
